name: System.Generic_Bignums

documentation.description:
This package provides arbitrary precision signed integer arithmetic
and can be used either built into the compiler via System.Bignums or to
implement a default version of Ada.Numerics.Big_Numbers.Big_Integers.

subprograms.name: Big_Abs
subprograms.code: function Big_Abs (X    : Bignum) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
"abs"

Perform indicated arithmetic operation on bignum values. No exception
raised except for Div/Mod/Rem by 0 which raises Constraint_Error with
an appropriate message.

subprograms.name: Big_Add
subprograms.code: function Big_Add (X, Y : Bignum) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
"+"
"-"
"*"
"/"
"**"
"mod"
"rem"
"-"
"abs"

Perform indicated arithmetic operation on bignum values. No exception
raised except for Div/Mod/Rem by 0 which raises Constraint_Error with
an appropriate message.

subprograms.name: Big_And
subprograms.code: function Big_And (X, Y : Bignum) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
"and"
"or"

Perform indicated bitwise operation on big num values.
The negative flags of X and Y are also combined.

subprograms.code: function Big_Div (X, Y : Bignum) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:

subprograms.name: Big_EQ
subprograms.code: function Big_EQ  (X, Y : Bignum) return Boolean

documentation.description:
"="
"/="
">="
"<="
 ">"
 "<"

Perform indicated comparison on bignums, returning result as Boolean.
No exception raised for any input arguments.

subprograms.name: Big_Shift_Left
subprograms.code: function Big_Shift_Left  (X : Bignum; Amount : Natural) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
Perform indicated bitwise operation on big num values.
Constraint_Error is raised if X is negative.

subprograms.name: Big_Shift_Right
subprograms.code: function Big_Shift_Right (X : Bignum; Amount : Natural) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
Perform indicated bitwise operation on big num values.
Constraint_Error is raised if X is negative.

"rem"
"-"
"abs"

Perform indicated arithmetic operation on bignum values. No exception

subprograms.name: Bignum_In_LLI_Range
subprograms.code: function Bignum_In_LLI_Range (X : Bignum) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Returns True if the Bignum value is in the range of Long_Long_Integer,
so that a call to From_Bignum is guaranteed not to raise an exception.

subprograms.name: From_Bignum
subprograms.code: function From_Bignum (X : Bignum) return Interfaces.Unsigned_128

documentation.description:
Convert Bignum to Unsigned_128. Constraint_Error raised with
appropriate message if value is out of range of Unsigned_128.

subprograms.name: From_Bignum
subprograms.code: function From_Bignum (X : Bignum) return Interfaces.Unsigned_64

documentation.description:
Convert Bignum to Unsigned_64. Constraint_Error raised with
appropriate message if value is out of range of Unsigned_64.

subprograms.name: From_Bignum
subprograms.code: function From_Bignum (X : Bignum) return Long_Long_Integer

documentation.description:
Convert Bignum to Long_Long_Integer. Constraint_Error raised with
appropriate message if value is out of range of Long_Long_Integer.

subprograms.name: From_Bignum
subprograms.code: function From_Bignum (X : Bignum) return Long_Long_Long_Integer

documentation.description:
Convert Bignum to Long_Long_Long_Integer. Constraint_Error raised with
appropriate message if value is out of range of Long_Long_Long_Integer.

subprograms.name: Is_Zero
subprograms.code: function Is_Zero (X : Bignum) return Boolean

documentation.description: Return True if X = 0

subprograms.name: To_Bignum
subprograms.code: function To_Bignum (X : Interfaces.Unsigned_128) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
Convert Unsigned_128 to a big integer. No exception can be raised for
any input argument.

subprograms.name: To_Bignum
subprograms.code: function To_Bignum (X : Interfaces.Unsigned_64) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
Convert Unsigned_64 to a big integer. No exception can be raised for any
input argument.

subprograms.name: To_Bignum
subprograms.code: function To_Bignum (X : Long_Long_Integer) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
Convert Long_Long_Integer to a big integer. No exception can be raised
for any input argument.

subprograms.name: To_Bignum
subprograms.code: function To_Bignum (X : Long_Long_Long_Integer) return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
Convert Long_Long_Long_Integer to a big integer. No exception can be
raised.

subprograms.name: To_String
subprograms.code:
function To_String
  (X : Bignum; Width : Natural := 0; Base : Positive := 10)
   return String

documentation.description:
Return the image of X, based on the given Width and Base, as defined
in the RM for Ada.Text_IO. Base should really be in the range 2 .. 16.

formals.name: Allocate_Big_Integer
formals.code:
function Allocate_Big_Integer
  (D : Shared_Bignums.Digit_Vector; Neg : Boolean) return Big_Integer

documentation.description: Allocate Bignum value with the given contents
Free the memory associated with X

formals.name: To_Bignum
formals.code:
function To_Bignum
  (X : aliased in out Big_Integer) return Shared_Bignums.Bignum

documentation.description: Convert the given Big_Integer to a Bignum
